description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:11 Docker image, caches the node_modules/ directory, and runs a global before_script executing `yarn`. Define three stages: test, build, and deploy. Add a `test` job in the test stage that runs `yarn test` and captures coverage with the regex `/^All files\s*\|\s*\d+\.*\d*\s*\|\s*(\d+\.*\d*)/`. Add a `build` job in the build stage that runs `yarn build`. Add a `publish` job in the deploy stage that runs only for tags or pipeline triggers, executes `yarn build`, creates an `.npmrc` containing the `${NPM_TOKEN}` secret via `echo '//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}' > .npmrc`, and runs `npm publish` to publish the package to the npm registry.
